task: Review the current change and report only real issues with evidence.

change.title: ThinkTank review-pr-289 migration fixture
change.summary: Historical ThinkTank review/default run migrated into Cerberus without invoking ThinkTank.
change.diff_summary:
diff --git a/lib/thinktank/cli.ex b/lib/thinktank/cli.ex
@@
-IO.read(:stdio, :all)
+IO.read(:stdio, :eof)

diff --git a/test/thinktank/e2e/smoke_test.exs b/test/thinktank/e2e/smoke_test.exs
@@
+exercise the built escript with shell-level stdin redirection

plan.summary: The change is an escript smoke-test and CI-wiring addition, with one production fix changing stdin reads from :all to :eof.
plan.synthesis_brief: Weight reviewer evidence around stdin/JSON correctness, hermetic subprocess setup, and whether the smoke suite protects the user-facing contract.

selected_agents.name: trace
selected_agents.brief: Focus on the production behavior change in lib/thinktank/cli.ex, stdin semantics, JSON stdout corruption, and exit-code behavior.

selected_agents.name: proof
selected_agents.brief: Audit the e2e smoke tests, fake pi harness, workspace helper, and default coverage guarantees.

selected_agents.name: scout
selected_agents.brief: Review Dagger e2e-smoke wiring, subprocess hermeticity, fake pi setup, and CI-only flake risk.

warnings: Most churn is in tests and CI; distinguish harness imperfections from true user-facing regressions.

agents.name: trace
agents.summary: No correctness issues found in the production behavior change.

agents.name: scout
agents.summary: The E2E smoke suite and CI wiring are robust, hermetic, and approved for this historical run.
